description_long: This is a tactical karambit knife with a highly curved, single-edged blade featuring bold red diagonal stripes on a matte black surface. The blade is sharply pointed and designed for slashing, with a pronounced curve that enhances its cutting efficiency. The handle is ergonomically contoured with finger grooves and a textured grip, providing secure handling, and it includes a prominent finger ring at the end for retention and maneuverability. The spine of the handle has additional grip ridges and a slight guard to prevent the hand from slipping onto the blade. The overall construction appears to be of metal, likely steel, with a polymer or rubberized grip for comfort and control. The knife has a modern, aggressive aesthetic, suitable for tactical or display purposes.
description: A modern karambit knife with a curved, red-striped blade and a contoured black handle featuring a finger ring and textured grip.
description_view_0: The knife is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the red stripes faintly visible.
description_view_1: The full side of the karambit is visible, highlighting the curved blade with red stripes, ergonomic handle, finger grooves, and ring.
description_view_2: The knife is viewed from the opposite edge, showing the thickness of the handle and blade, with less detail visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the knife is shown, again displaying the curved blade, red stripes, and the full handle with finger ring.
attribute_handle_design: contoured black handle with finger grooves, textured grip, and a finger ring
attribute_ornamentation: red diagonal stripes on the blade
